title: Assessment Appraisal Advocacy and Item Holds Including Parkside Commons
summary: Council member Williams presents items 24-32; item 24 held, item 26 (property appraisal) debated. Commissioner Michael Collins (Neighborhood and Business Development) advocates moving forward with appraisal despite council hesitation, noting it does not commit to purchase and assessor backlog could delay the project. Council and deputy mayor agree to discuss offline. Remainder of items ready.
